title: Format Employee Names
scenario: Write a JavaScript function that formats a string containing an employee's name. The function should take the string, split it into first and last names, and return a new string with the names in title case. Ensure the function handles names with multiple words and can handle names in any case.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the JavaScript code has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the function correctly formats the employee's name and returns it in title case.
